items.title: Report in Iran: Tehran rejects US proposal to end the war
items.desc: The Iranian news agency IRIB reported that Iran has rejected the American proposal to end the war.According to the report, officials in Tehran claimed that "the American proposal is equivalent to a surrender by Tehran to Trump’s excessive demands."
